title: fs dependency was not found
author: sapfiris
body:
I install your package (npm version 5.6.0 and node version 8.11.1)
and get an error: 
`This dependency was not found:
* fs in ./~/exceljs/dist/es5/xlsx/xlsx.js, ./~/exceljs/dist/es5/utils/utils.js and 24 others`.

How solve this problem?

comments.author: guyonroche
comments.body: @sapfiris I'm not sure how you are getting this error - "fs" is an inbuilt module in nodejs and not required as a dependency. Can you show more output?

comments.author: Miggleness
ahouck
comments.body:
> I'm encountering the same error. Using Node 8.14 and typescript 2.4. I'm using this lib on top of SharepointFx.
> 
> I'm only interested in the browser component, hence only imported that.
> 
> ```ts
> import ExcelJS from "exceljs/dist/es5/exceljs.browser";
> 
> function generateExcel() {
>   var wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook(); // commenting this line out lets me lead the page successfully
> }
> ```

How did you get the type definitions for the browser? Did you generate your own .d.ts file?

comments.author: AbdealiLoKo
comments.body: I seem to be stuck at the same point about getting type definitions for the browser - any leads would be helpful!
